hooks.command: bash -c 'R=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "."); G=$(git rev-parse --git-dir 2>/dev/null || echo ".git"); [ -f "$G/commondir" ] && R=$(cd "$G/$(cat "$G/commondir")/.." && pwd); [ -f "$R/.claude/hooks/agent_state.py" ] && HOOK_ROOT="$R" python3 "$R/.claude/hooks/agent_state.py" || true'
